mdEditor.theme.label: Theme
mdEditor.theme.helpText: Use this only when the editor webview should be forced to a specific dark, light, high-contrast, or default theme.
mdEditor.theme.testCoverage: settings-taxonomy.test.mjs validates metadata and package ordering.

mdEditor.attachments.locationMode.label: Location Mode
mdEditor.attachments.locationMode.shortDescription: Chooses where uploaded attachments are saved.
mdEditor.attachments.locationMode.helpText: Use the per-document .attachments folder for portable notes, the Markdown folder for flat folders, a workspace-relative folder for shared asset folders, or ask each time.

mdEditor.attachments.folderName.label: Folder Name
mdEditor.attachments.folderName.shortDescription: Names the folder created beside the Markdown file.
mdEditor.attachments.folderName.helpText: Only applies when Location Mode is markdown-folder-attachments.
mdEditor.attachments.folderName.compatibilityNotes: Existing attachment links are not rewritten by changing this setting.

mdEditor.attachments.path.label: Workspace Path
mdEditor.attachments.path.helpText: Only applies when Location Mode is workspace-relative-path. Use a relative path, not an absolute filesystem path.
mdEditor.attachments.path.compatibilityNotes: Saved Markdown uses paths relative to the Markdown file.

mdEditor.attachments.alwaysUseOriginalFi.label: Use Original Filename
mdEditor.attachments.alwaysUseOriginalFi.helpText: Existing files are never overwritten. MalkDown Editor still creates a safe unique filename when a collision exists.
mdEditor.attachments.alwaysUseOriginalFi.testCoverage: attachment-trash-settings.test.mjs and settings-combinations.test.mjs cover attachment naming paths.
mdEditor.attachments.alwaysUseOriginalFi.compatibilityNotes: Does not change existing Markdown links.

mdEditor.attachments.alwaysConfirmNameAn.label: Confirm Name And Path
mdEditor.attachments.alwaysConfirmNameAn.shortDescription: Asks before each attachment is saved.
mdEditor.attachments.alwaysConfirmNameAn.helpText: Shows the attachment save prompt so the folder, original-name choice, and generated filename can be reviewed.
mdEditor.attachments.alwaysConfirmNameAn.testCoverage: settings-combinations.test.mjs keeps the setting registered and covered by the matrix.

mdEditor.attachments.generatedNameDigits.label: Generated Name Digits
mdEditor.attachments.generatedNameDigits.shortDescription: Sets the number padding for generated filenames.
mdEditor.attachments.generatedNameDigits.helpText: For example, 9 digits creates filenames like features-000000001.png.
mdEditor.attachments.generatedNameDigits.compatibilityNotes: Existing generated filenames keep their current names.

mdEditor.attachments.askBeforeDeletingFi.label: Ask Before Deleting Files
mdEditor.attachments.askBeforeDeletingFi.shortDescription: Confirms before a local attachment file can be deleted from disk.
mdEditor.attachments.askBeforeDeletingFi.helpText: When an attachment reference is removed from the page, the cleanup dialog lets the user Cancel, Remove from Page, Move to Trash, or Delete Everywhere.
mdEditor.attachments.askBeforeDeletingFi.testCoverage: attachment-dialog.test.mjs verifies cleanup copy and safe defaults.
mdEditor.attachments.askBeforeDeletingFi.compatibilityNotes: Cancel restores the attachment reference in the Markdown document.

mdEditor.attachments.trash.enabled.label: Enable Attachment Trash
mdEditor.attachments.trash.enabled.shortDescription: Shows the recoverable Move to Trash action.
mdEditor.attachments.trash.enabled.helpText: When enabled, local attachment files can be moved into the attachment trash instead of being permanently deleted.
mdEditor.attachments.trash.enabled.testCoverage: attachment-trash-settings.test.mjs and attachment-trash-filesystem.test.mjs cover trash behavior.
mdEditor.attachments.trash.enabled.compatibilityNotes: Restore tooling is planned but not implemented yet.

mdEditor.attachments.trash.folderName.label: Workspace Trash Folder
mdEditor.attachments.trash.folderName.shortDescription: Sets the workspace-root relative attachment trash folder.
mdEditor.attachments.trash.folderName.helpText: The default .attachments-trash value creates one master attachment trash folder in the current workspace root. Absolute paths and paths outside the workspace are not supported for safety.
mdEditor.attachments.trash.folderName.testCoverage: attachment-trash-settings.test.mjs validates safe folder fallback and sanitization.
mdEditor.attachments.trash.folderName.compatibilityNotes: Do not point this at the active attachment folder.

mdEditor.attachments.trash.preserveOrigi.label: Preserve Original Path
mdEditor.attachments.trash.preserveOrigi.shortDescription: Keeps the original workspace-relative folder path inside trash.
mdEditor.attachments.trash.preserveOrigi.helpText: This makes future restore tooling easier because trashed files remember where they came from.

mdEditor.attachments.trash.writeIndex.label: Write Trash Index
mdEditor.attachments.trash.writeIndex.shortDescription: Writes an index entry when an attachment is moved to trash.
mdEditor.attachments.trash.writeIndex.helpText: The index records source and destination details for future restore and audit features.
mdEditor.attachments.trash.writeIndex.compatibilityNotes: The index is JSON and may grow over time.

mdEditor.tables.floatingToolbar.label: Floating Toolbar
mdEditor.tables.floatingToolbar.shortDescription: Shows the table toolbar inside tables.
mdEditor.tables.floatingToolbar.helpText: The toolbar contains quick row, column, and table actions.

mdEditor.tables.contextMenu.label: Right-Click Menu
mdEditor.tables.contextMenu.shortDescription: Enables the table right-click action menu.
mdEditor.tables.contextMenu.helpText: The menu contains the same row, column, and table actions as the toolbar.
mdEditor.tables.contextMenu.compatibilityNotes: VS Code context-menu behavior may still limit empty-editor menus.

mdEditor.tables.milkdownControls.label: Built-In Table Handles
mdEditor.tables.milkdownControls.shortDescription: Shows Milkdown table handles and grid add controls.
mdEditor.tables.milkdownControls.helpText: These are the built-in table handles used for selection, drag, alignment, and quick insertion.

mdEditor.tables.slashMenu.label: Table-Cell Slash Menu
mdEditor.tables.slashMenu.shortDescription: Enables slash actions inside table cells.
mdEditor.tables.slashMenu.helpText: Type / as the first character in a table cell to open table row, column, and delete actions.
mdEditor.tables.slashMenu.compatibilityNotes: The menu intentionally opens only at the start of a table cell.

mdEditor.tables.defaultRows.label: Default Rows
mdEditor.tables.defaultRows.shortDescription: Sets the default row count for Insert Table.
mdEditor.tables.defaultRows.helpText: Used when Insert Behavior is Use Default Size.
mdEditor.tables.defaultRows.compatibilityNotes: Generated tables remain GFM Markdown tables.

mdEditor.tables.defaultColumns.label: Default Columns
mdEditor.tables.defaultColumns.shortDescription: Sets the default column count for Insert Table.
mdEditor.tables.defaultColumns.helpText: Used when Insert Behavior is Use Default Size.
mdEditor.tables.defaultColumns.compatibilityNotes: Generated tables remain GFM Markdown tables.

mdEditor.tables.insertBehavior.label: Insert Behavior
mdEditor.tables.insertBehavior.shortDescription: Chooses whether Insert Table asks for size.
mdEditor.tables.insertBehavior.helpText: Use Default Size inserts immediately. Ask Every Time opens the row and column picker.
mdEditor.tables.insertBehavior.compatibilityNotes: Generated tables remain GFM Markdown tables.

mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowLanguage.label: Always Show Language
mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowLanguage.shortDescription: Keeps the code block language label visible.
mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowLanguage.helpText: When disabled, the language label can be hidden until hover by the editor styling.
mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowLanguage.testCoverage: settings-combinations.test.mjs keeps the setting registered and covered by the matrix.
mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowLanguage.compatibilityNotes: Does not change fenced code block Markdown.

mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowCopyButton.label: Always Show Copy Button
mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowCopyButton.shortDescription: Keeps the code block Copy button visible.
mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowCopyButton.helpText: When disabled, the Copy button can be hidden until hover by the editor styling.
mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowCopyButton.testCoverage: settings-combinations.test.mjs keeps the setting registered and covered by the matrix.
mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowCopyButton.compatibilityNotes: Does not change fenced code block Markdown.

mdEditor.dateTime.dateFormat.label: Date Format
mdEditor.dateTime.dateFormat.shortDescription: Sets the date format for timestamp tools.
mdEditor.dateTime.dateFormat.helpText: Supported date tokens include yyyy, yy, MM, M, dd, and d.
mdEditor.dateTime.dateFormat.compatibilityNotes: Generated text is plain Markdown text.

mdEditor.dateTime.timeFormat.label: Time Format
mdEditor.dateTime.timeFormat.shortDescription: Sets the time format for timestamp tools.
mdEditor.dateTime.timeFormat.helpText: Supported time tokens include HH, H, hh, h, mm, ss, and a.
mdEditor.dateTime.timeFormat.compatibilityNotes: Generated text is plain Markdown text.

mdEditor.dateTime.lastUpdatedTemplate.label: Last Updated Template
mdEditor.dateTime.lastUpdatedTemplate.shortDescription: Sets the template for Last Updated actions.
mdEditor.dateTime.lastUpdatedTemplate.compatibilityNotes: Generated text is plain Markdown text.

mdEditor.dateTime.historyEntryTemplate.label: History Entry Template
mdEditor.dateTime.historyEntryTemplate.shortDescription: Sets the template for history entries.
mdEditor.dateTime.historyEntryTemplate.compatibilityNotes: Generated text is plain Markdown list text by default.

mdEditor.dateTime.customTemplate.label: Custom Timestamp Template
mdEditor.dateTime.customTemplate.shortDescription: Sets the template for custom timestamp snippets.
mdEditor.dateTime.customTemplate.compatibilityNotes: Generated text is plain Markdown text.

mdEditor.dateTime.inlineSlashShortcuts.label: Inline Slash Shortcuts
mdEditor.dateTime.inlineSlashShortcuts.helpText: Shortcuts such as /date, /time, /datetime, /updated, and /history are replaced only when accepted with Tab or Enter.
mdEditor.dateTime.inlineSlashShortcuts.compatibilityNotes: Shortcuts are ignored inside URLs, paths, and words.

futureCategories.Editor Behavior: Lock blocks, zoom behavior, selection behavior, drag behavior, and other editor interaction rules.
futureCategories.Advanced: Low-level compatibility or migration settings that should be rare and clearly documented.
